ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., quarterback, point guard) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player ended their professional career */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team plays in (e.g., East, West) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's assistant coach */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport played in the league (e.g., Football, Basketball) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_office_location" TEXT /* Location of the league's office */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visiting team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Final score of the game */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the game */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the game's referee */,
  "first_quarter_score" INTEGER /* Score at the end of the first quarter */,
  "second_quarter_score" INTEGER /* Score at the end of the second quarter */,
  "third_quarter_score" INTEGER /* Score at the end of the third quarter */,
  "fourth_quarter_score" INTEGER /* Score at the end of the fourth quarter */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the game went into overtime */,
  "overtime_score" INTEGER /* Score at the end of the overtime period */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's stats in each game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the stats were recorded in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the stats belong to */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player was on the court/field */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Player efficiency rating (PER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
